title: Magic shortbow (i)
wikitext:
{{Infobox Item |name = Magic shortbow (i) |image = [[File:Magic shortbow (i).png]] |release = [[18 September]] [[2014]] |update = Bounty Hunter |members = Yes |quest = No |tradeable = No |placeholder = Yes |equipable = Yes |stackable = No |noteable = No |options = Wield, Drop |examine = Short and magical, but still effective. |value = 1600 |weight = 1.360 |id = 12788 |leagueRegion = Wilderness }} [[File:Magic shortbow (i) detail.png|left|150x150px]] The '''magic shortbow (i)''' is a bow that requires level 50 [[Ranged]] in order to use, and is obtained by using a [[magic shortbow scroll]] on a regular [[magic shortbow]]. The imbued bow has +75 Ranged attack, instead of the regular bow's +69, and uses 50% of the special bar when performing the special attack, instead of the regular bow's 55%. Typically, a magic shortbow with [[amethyst arrows]] or [[rune arrows]] deals significantly higher damage-per-second than a [[rune crossbow]] with [[broad bolts]], while a magic shortbow with [[adamant arrows|adamant]] or [[broad arrows]] deals noticeably less damage-per-second. After being imbued by the [[magic shortbow scroll]], the bow '''cannot be reverted''', and there's no way to reclaim the scroll. On death, players who lose the magic shortbow (i) will drop a regular magic shortbow for the person who killed them. ==Combat stats== {{Infobox Bonuses |astab = 0 |aslash = 0 |acrush = 0 |amagic = 0 |arange = +75 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |str = 0 |rstr = 0 |mdmg = 0 |prayer = 0 |slot = 2h |speed = 4 |attackrange = 7 |combatstyle = Bow |image = [[File:Magic shortbow (i) equipped male.png|180px]] |altimage = [[File:Magic shortbow (i) equipped female.png|180px]] }} {{CombatStyles|Bow|speed=4|attackrange=7}} ==Special attack== [[File:Snapshot.gif|thumb|250px|A player performing the magic shortbow's special attack, ''Snapshot''.]] This weapon retains the standard magic shortbow's [[special attack]], ''Snapshot'', which fires two arrows in rapid succession but with lowered accuracy, using 50% of the player's special attack energy. While the in-game tooltip states that ''Snapshot'' has reduced accuracy, it actually likely has an accuracy boost of \frac{10}{7} or about 43%.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1042029374428639232|date=18 September 2018|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/100981|archivedate=23 May 2021|quote=Looks to me like it's a 43% buff, not a nerf.}} ''Snapshot'' uses a custom form of damage calculation that does not take into account the slayer helmet (i)'s damage boost (on a Slayer task) and the offensive Prayers (such as [[Eagle Eye]]) when determining a player's [[Maximum ranged hit#Calculating your maximum ranged hit|maximum Ranged hit]],{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1167133164642480131|date=29 August 2019|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/102769|archivedate=23 May 2021|quote=[The special attack for rune throwing axes, magic shortbow, and magic longbow all ignore the active range boosting prayers for the special attack, and this ends up with a lower max hit during special attack. is this intentional?] They always had their own special calculations for effective accuracy/damage (...)}} but its accuracy is still affected.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/jagexash/status/1396397301925662723|date=23 May 2021|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/101488|archivedate=23 May 2021|quote=Correct, it does now affect that spec, and every other custom attack I've seen so far.}} The following formula can be used to calculate the max hit of ''Snapshot'':

\text{Maximum Hit} =\left\lfloor 0.5+\frac{(\text{Visible Ranged Level} + 10) *(\text{Ammo Ranged Strength} +64)}{640} \right\rfloor {{efn|name=level|Only the player's visible ranged level matters. Boosts given through prayers and Void Knight armour are ignored.}} {{efn|name=stance|A stance bonus of 10 is used regardless of attack style used.}} {{efn|name=ammo|The ranged strength bonus of the player's armour and gear is ignored. Only the ranged strength bonus of the player's ammo is used.}} {{efn|name=slayer|The bonus damage usually provided by wearing a Slayer helmet (i), Salve amulet (i) or Salve amulet (ei) is ignored.}} {{notelist}} ==Creation== {{Recipe |members = Yes |ticks = 0 |mat1 = Magic shortbow |mat2 = Magic shortbow scroll |output1 = Magic shortbow (i) |output1cost = No }} ==Used in recommended equipment== {{Used in recommended equipment|Magic shortbow (i)}} ==Comparison between other ranged weapons== {{Ranged weapons comparison}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 24 May 2023 |update = Bounty Hunter is Back! |change = The item was graphically updated. }} {{Subject changes |date = 9 October 2014 |update = New Bounty Hunter Rewards |poll = Old School Bounty Hunter Rewards 2 |change = Increases range bonus from +69 to +75. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Magic shortbow detail.png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:Magic shortbow (i) detail.png|center|300x150px]] |- |[[File:Magic shortbow.png|center]] |[[File:Magic shortbow (i).png|center]] |- |18 September 2014⁠–
24 May 2023 |24 May 2023 ⁠–
present |} == Trivia == * The icon of the bow is animated, but only shows one frame at a time. Whenever the player updates their inventory using the bank, the icon updates. The update will happen regardless of the bow being in the bank or inventory. ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Ranged weapons}} [[Category:Weapons with Special attacks]]
